title: Congo: Traps, Treaties And Counterterrorism
impact_evidence: Social | Equity, Rights & Vulnerable Groups | Land ownership impacts and regional value changes -> "Zambia fears it will be another victim of Chinese Debt Trap tactics which involve offers to settle such debts by taking possession of key items, like ports, railroads or mining rights, that China wants to control."
impact_level3: Land ownership impacts and regional value changes

title: Zambia : If we don't industrialize, everyone will continue to exploit Africa
impact_evidence: Social | Livelihoods & Economy | Income generation and poverty reduction or exacerbation -> "If the European model was characterized by unfair partnership, why are we allowing the Chinese who don't use guns to kill our fragile and uncompetitive industries, kill jobs and create more hunger for our people?" || Social | Livelihoods & Economy | Human capital development (skills, training, workforce development) -> "Zambia exports raw copper because it has no machinery, human skills and infrastructure to produce it." || Governance | Regulation, Compliance & Institutions | Legislative and regulatory framework effectiveness -> "In the WTO for example, there are some clear provisions that speak about rich countries helping least developed countries to acquire technology transfer but are never implemented."
impact_level2: Livelihoods & Economy || Livelihoods & Economy || Regulation, Compliance & Institutions
impact_level3: Income generation and poverty reduction or exacerbation || Human capital development (skills, training, workforce development) || Legislative and regulatory framework effectiveness

title: Zambia : KCM needs $270 million to deal with flooding mine, Minister told
impact_evidence: Environmental | Water Resources | Water management challenges -> "About $270 million is needed for the procurement of a pump chamber meant to pump out water at three shafts which are flooded at Konkola Copper Mines (KCM) in Chililabombwe." | "KCM General Manager Technical Services Davy Mubita said that currently, the mining firm is spending close to $4.2 million monthly to pump out 375 cubic litres of water underground." || Environmental | Water Resources | Water table alteration and drainage issues -> "the firm cannot mine further than 1,390 meters underground because it is still wet." | "About $270 million is needed for the procurement of a pump chamber meant to pump out water at three shafts which are flooded at Konkola Copper Mines (KCM) in Chililabombwe." || Governance | Reputation & Social License | Mining image and public perception -> "Mr. Kabuswe said Vedanta Resources PLC was the worst investment Zambia had ever had," | "Mr. Kabuswe... said soon, Government will announce its position over the future of KCM."
impact_level2: Water Resources || Water Resources || Reputation & Social License
impact_level3: Water management challenges || Water table alteration and drainage issues || Mining image and public perception

impact_evidence: Environmental | Land, Soil & Geology | Topsoil degradation and loss of soil fertility -> "rocks were dug up and crushed to extract lead but in the process particles of the deadly metal swept over the town, seeping into the ground, homes and bodies." | "particles of the deadly metal swept over the town, seeping into the ground, homes and bodies" || Environmental | Air & Climate | Dust generation -> "rocks were dug up and crushed to extract lead but in the process particles of the deadly metal swept over the town" | "particles of the deadly metal swept over the town" || Social | Health, Safety & Well-being | Mental and physical health impacts on communities -> "Anglo American faces a major legal battle over claims that one of its mines in Zambia poisoned 100,000 people including babies, pregnant women and children." | "Lead poisoning can ruin the nervous system and damage organs including the heart, kidneys and brain." | "Around 75 per cent of Kabwe's population are thought to have significant levels of lead in their blood" || Governance | Risk Management & Long-Term Stewardship | Long-term liability management (pollution, water treatment, land stability) -> "The lawsuit aims to set up a long-term programme to test blood lead levels, and for Anglo to shoulder the clean-up costs." | "Kabwe was included in an eight-year World Bank scheme to clean up Zambian mines"
